tiktok.notes: Max 1080p. Platform favors 21-34 seconds. 287MB on iOS, 72MB on Android.

instagram_reels.notes: Up to 3 minutes. 3500-5000 kbps recommended bitrate.

instagram_stories.notes: 3-15 sec segments, up to 60s per segment.

youtube_shorts.notes: Algorithm favors <60s. Safe zone: 180px top, 390px bottom, 60px sides.

bluesky.notes: Horizontal 16:9 default. Also supports 9:16 vertical. Autoplay muted — captions recommended.

facebook_reels.notes: No duration cap as of 2025. Min 720x1280. 15-30s videos see highest engagement.

universal_vertical.notes: Single render at 1080x1920 works for TikTok, IG Reels, IG Stories, YouTube Shorts, and Facebook Reels. Bluesky prefers 16:9 but accepts 9:16.
